name: Is my website ready for AI SEO, or do I need to fix technical issues first?
description: Fix crawl and content issues first if your site is weak technically. AI systems cannot cite pages they cannot access or understand well.

mainEntity.name: Is my website ready for AI SEO, or do I need to fix technical issues first?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your site has weak crawlability, blocked pages, or thin content, fix that before expecting AI visibility. AI systems can only use pages they can access, understand, and trust.
acceptedAnswer.description: Fix crawl and content issues first if your site is weak technically. AI systems cannot cite pages they cannot access or understand well.
